basic_details.job_title: BPSC Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 13 Professor Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official BPSC website. The last date to submit the application form is 30-06-2026. In this article, you’ll find the BPSC Professor Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

age_limit.details: Minimum age Limit: 32 years Maximum Age Limit: 65 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D degree in Physics / Chemistry and First Class or equivalent at either Bachelor's or Master's level in Physics / Chemistry.
qualification.details: Qualifications: Ph.D degree in Physics / Chemistry and First Class or equivalent at either Bachelor's or Master's level in Physics / Chemistry. Experience: Minimum of 10 years of experience in teaching/research/industry out of which at least 3 years shall be at a post equivalent to that of an Associate Professor.

selection_process: Academic Background (Weightage-20) Evaluation of Academic Performance
Domain Knowledge and Teaching skill. (weightage-60) Viva-voce (weightage-20)
how_to_apply: Online applications are invited from eligible Indian candidates in the prescribed form.
Detailed guidelines for filling the online application are displayed on the website www.bpsc.bihar.gov.in of Bihar Public Service Commission, Patna.
important_instructions: Note: Degrees or Diplomas obtained from institutions recognized by UGC and AICTE through Distance Mode/Open University for Humanities and Science subjects will be valid. For previous service and experience, the provisions and conditions of All India Council for Technical Education Regulation, 2019 paragraph-2.25 will apply. In case of any difference in educational qualification, the qualification described in English will be valid. The age of interested candidates/applicants as on 01.08.2026 should be minimum 32 years and there is no maximum age limit. The retirement age is fixed at 65 years. Selection will be based on the following details, for which the weightage scheme will be as follows. For reservation, if not marked in the online application form, the benefit of reservation will not be given and the benefit of reservation will be as per the prevailing reservation rules of the state government and on the basis of the certificate issued by the competent officer of the state government. The benefit of reservation will be given only to the original residents of Bihar. For Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe candidates, it will be mandatory to submit the following certificates. For Backward Class and Extremely Backward Class candidates, it will be mandatory to submit non-creamy layer certificate. For the reservation of economically weaker section as per the light of letter no.12123 dated 23.06.2023 of Bihar General Administration Department. For benchmark disabled persons, horizontal reservation will be admissible only to the original residents of Bihar State. It is mandatory for candidates claiming multiple disabilities to attach a copy of the certificate issued in the prescribed form Form VI (Form VI) in The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017, otherwise the benefit of reservation on the basis of multiple disabilities will not be given. No amendment can be made in the process of appointment/promotion/enrollment in between the process as per the light of General Administration Department letter no.16144 dated 28.11.2012. All the above reservation related certificates will be required to be submitted in original at the time of document verification/interview in the Commission office. The benefit of reservation will not be given if not submitted. All desired certificates must be issued by the date of filling online application for this advertised post - 30-06-2026. If the last date of filling application is extended as per the situation, then no last date related to qualification will be extended or affected. Any concession mentioned in the advertisement in any type of information/condition/information mentioned in the advertisement will be final in form. It will be mandatory for the candidates to submit the original copies of the following certificates issued by the competent authority for verification at the time of document verification/interview. Matric or equivalent certificate/mark sheet (for evidence of date of birth). Graduation degree certificate (as per paragraph-3 educational qualification of the advertisement). Graduation mark sheet (subject/semester wise) (as per paragraph-3 educational qualification of the advertisement). Postgraduate degree certificate (as per paragraph-3 educational qualification of the advertisement). Postgraduate mark sheet (subject/semester wise) (as per paragraph-3 educational qualification of the advertisement). Ph.D. certificate (as per paragraph-3 educational qualification of the advertisement). Certificate from the concerned university that the Bachelor's and Master's degree has been obtained in regularly conducted technical courses only. Certificate or Diploma obtained from institutions recognized by UGC and AICTE through Distance Mode/Open University for science subjects. Certificate regarding the formula for converting CGPA and grade to percentage/marks in the year/session in which the candidate has passed Bachelor's and Master's degree as per the rules of the board/university. Certificate as per paragraph-3 (experience) of the advertisement and paragraph-5 (weightage) issued by the appointing authority as per the regulation of All India Technical Education Council. For Backward Class/Extremely Backward Class candidates, non-creamy layer certificate (for female candidates, non-creamy layer certificate issued in the name and address of father). For Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe candidates, caste and permanent residence certificate (for female candidates, caste and permanent residence certificate issued in the name and address of father). For candidates claiming Economically Weaker Section (EWS), certificate related to the same issued by the competent authority in the prescribed form as per the light of notification no.2622 dated 26.02.2019 of Bihar Government. In case of claiming disability, valid certificate issued by the competent authority in the prescribed form. Certificate related to ex-servicemen for claiming relaxation in that limit. No Objection Certificate issued by the competent authority if appointed to any post under the Central Government, Bihar Government or any other state government. Identity card (with photo), as claimed in the application. 4 (four) recent passport size photos. Copy of the online application filled for the written examination. It will be mandatory to submit the original of the above certificates at the time of document verification. If any candidate submits incomplete/erroneous certificate at the time of document verification/interview, then one final opportunity (maximum one week) to rectify the error will be given and conditional permission to participate in the interview will be given. If the candidate is not able to submit the correct certificate even after the specified period, the candidature will be cancelled. Fee:- As per the light of resolution of General Administration Department, Bihar-15568, dated-21.08.2025, examination fee for each candidate - 100/- (one hundred rupees). The candidate will have to pay the charge fixed by different banks in addition to the above examination fee, which will be taken by the bank as bank charge in the course of online payment. Note:- For those candidates who have not marked Aadhaar Number as identity card in the online application, they will have to pay Biometric fee of 200/- (two hundred) rupees additional fee. Date and other instructions related to filling online application form:- (i) Online application Reopen starting date 18.06.2026 Reopen Last date for filling online application 30.06.2026 There is no need to send the hard copy of the application form and related papers to the Commission office for filling the online application. If any supplementary paper or application in hard copy is given by the candidate himself, then no claim made on that hard copy application/paper and on its basis will be allowed. For filling online application for this advertisement, detailed instructions are displayed on the Commission's official website www.bpsc.bihar.gov.in. It will be mandatory for the candidates to follow the said guidelines well before filling the online application and to mark all the information correctly and clearly in the course of filling the online application. For online payment, detailed instructions are displayed on the website of Bihar Public Service Commission www.bpsc.bihar.gov.in. The candidature of the candidates will not be ensured merely by filling the online application by the candidate. The final decision regarding the eligibility of the candidates will be taken on the basis of the papers submitted by the candidates. The certificates related to educational qualification, experience and journals will be valid only those which the candidate has mentioned in his original application form. All information related to this advertisement will be published on the Commission's website www.bpsc.bihar.gov.in, separate publication in newspapers is not expected. For filling the online application for this advertisement to fill the online application for prescribed online application, printed, typed, handwritten applications will not be accepted, as well as incomplete, unclear, unsigned and late received application forms will be rejected and the examination fee will not be refunded in any situation. The applicants should fill all the entries carefully in the online application. No change/correction in any type of adverse result will be valid in the future. The Commission will not be responsible for any type of error and the applicant will be responsible for any adverse result himself. Examination Controller, Bihar Public Service Commission, Patna.

faq.question: Q1. What is the educational qualification for BPSC Professor (Physics, Chemistry) recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ph.D degree in Physics / Chemistry and First Class or equivalent at either Bachelor's or Master's level in Physics / Chemistry from recognized institutions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the experience required for BPSC Professor recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Minimum 10 years in teaching/research/industry, with at least 3 years as Associate Professor equivalent, plus research publications and Ph.D guidance as specified in notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for BPSC Professor (Physics, Chemistry) 2026?
faq.answer: Minimum 32 years as on 01.08.2026, no upper limit, retirement at 65 years for candidates applying to government engineering colleges.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for BPSC Professor recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online through BPSC website www.bpsc.bihar.gov.in from 18/06/2026 to 30/06/2026, following detailed guidelines, with OTR registration mandatory.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for BPSC Professor posts in 2026?
faq.answer: Pay Level 14 with entry pay Rs. 1,44,200/- per month for Professors in Physics and Chemistry under Bihar government.

title: BPSC Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
